text: I feel a sense of curiosity stepping into this space of innovation and research. The glass-walled room suggests transparency and openness, inviting exploration. As I see my own reflection, I am reminded of the dual role of observer and participant: I seek knowledge but am also observed by my own gaze. Entering the R+D exhibit, the bright colors and modern displays evoke excitement, yet there is an undercurrent of introspection. The words prompt me to consider how humans connect with technology, and how meaning is projected onto objects—I am both inspired and contemplative, wondering about the nature of invention and the stories behind these creations.
